title: BYOH Chat Request
description: JSON body for POST /chat — the optional interactive chat endpoint that harnesses may implement on AGENT_CHAT_PORT.

sessionId.description: Opaque conversation session identifier used to correlate turns within a single chat session.

history.description: Prior conversation turns, ordered oldest-first. May be omitted for single-turn requests.

role.description: The speaker role for this turn.

content.description: The message content for this turn.

messageId.description: Optional idempotency key for this specific message. Callers may retry with the same messageId to avoid duplicate processing.

history.content: Hi! How can I help you today?
